metadata.name: cytosummarynet
metadata.summary: Capturing cell heterogeneity in representations of cell populations for image-based profiling using contrastive learning

classes.name: cytosummarynet.models.CytoSummaryNet

methods.name: cytosummarynet.models.CytoSummaryNet.__init__
documentation:
Args:
    input_dim (int): Input feature size.
    latent_dim (int): Output size of the cell feature extractor.
    output_dim (int): Output size of the projection head.
    scaling_factor (float): Factor to scale intermediate layer sizes.
    dropout (float): Dropout rate.
    cell_layers (int or List[int]): Number of layers or list of layer sizes for the cell extractor.
    proj_layers (int or List[int]): Number of layers or list of layer sizes for the projection head.
    reduction (str): Pooling method ('sum', 'mean', or 'max').
    activation (nn.Module): Activation function.

methods.name: cytosummarynet.models.CytoSummaryNet._build_layers
documentation:
Builds a sequential module with the specified number of layers or layer dimensions.

Args:
    input_dim (int): Input feature size.
    output_dim (int): Output feature size.
    num_layers (int or List[int]): Number of layers or list of layer sizes.
    scaling_factor (float): Scaling factor for intermediate layers.
    activation (nn.Module): Activation function.

Returns:
    nn.Sequential: Sequential module with the specified layers.

methods.name: cytosummarynet.models.CytoSummaryNet.forward
documentation:
Forward pass through the model.

Args:
    x (torch.Tensor): Input tensor of shape (batch_size, num_cells, input_dim).

Returns:
    Tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor]: Projected features and cell-wise activations.
Modular and parameterizable CytoSummaryNet architecture for feature extraction and projection with pooling.

classes.name: cytosummarynet.dataset.TemplateDataset

methods.name: cytosummarynet.dataset.TemplateDataset.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the dataset.

Args:
    metadata_df (pd.DataFrame): DataFrame with metadata and paths to pickle files.
    label_column (str): Column name containing the labels.
    path_column (str): Column name containing paths to pickle files.
    nr_cells (int): Number of cells to sample per well.
    nr_sets (int): Number of samples to draw per label group.
    min_cells_per_well (int): Minimum number of cells required in a well for sampling.

methods.name: cytosummarynet.dataset.TemplateDataset.__len__
documentation: Return the number of unique labels/groups in the dataset.

methods.name: cytosummarynet.dataset.TemplateDataset.__getitem__
documentation:
Fetch a sample by group index.

Args:
    index (int): Index of the label group to fetch.

Returns:
    Tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor]: Sampled features and replicated labels.

methods.name: cytosummarynet.dataset.TemplateDataset._load_group_samples
documentation:
Load pickle files for a given group and filter invalid wells.

Args:
    group_samples (pd.DataFrame): DataFrame containing group metadata.

Returns:
    List[dict]: List of valid wells with cell features.

methods.name: cytosummarynet.dataset.TemplateDataset._sample_features
documentation:
Generate augmented samples by randomly combining wells and sampling cells.

Args:
    samples (List[dict]): List of valid wells for the group.

Returns:
    torch.Tensor: Augmented feature samples of shape (nr_sets, nr_cells, feature_dim).

A PyTorch Dataset for handling imbalanced data with label-based grouping
and multi-stage sampling for data augmentation.

functions.name: cytosummarynet.engine.train_loop
documentation: Train a PyTorch model with the given parameters.

functions.name: cytosummarynet.engine.validate_model
documentation: Evaluate the model on validation data.

functions.name: cytosummarynet.engine.calculate_mAP
documentation: Calculate the mean Average Precision (mAP) given embeddings and labels.
